key.name: selected-vendor
key.description: The vendor shown by default in the panel indicator and dropdown.

key.name: refresh-interval-seconds
key.description: How often usage should refresh in the background, in seconds.

key.name: dropdown-opacity-percent
key.description: The opacity percentage used for the extension dropdown window.

key.name: follow-system-theme
key.description: Whether the extension should use GNOME Shell theme colors instead of its built-in usage colors.

key.name: display-metric
key.description: Whether usage percentages show the consumed (used) or available (remaining) share of each window.

key.name: metric-display-mode
key.description: Whether dropdown usage windows render as text, a progress bar, or both.

key.name: panel-icon-style
key.description: Whether the top-bar icon uses the provider logo, a generic symbolic icon, or is hidden.

key.name: show-panel-percentage
key.description: Whether the top-bar indicator shows the usage percentage text.

key.name: show-panel-reset
key.description: Whether the top-bar indicator appends the reset countdown after the usage percentage.

key.name: color-panel-text-by-usage
key.description: Whether the top-bar text should use the configured usage threshold colors, overriding the system theme for panel text only.

key.name: warning-threshold-enabled
key.description: Whether usage warnings should be shown when a usage window reaches the warning threshold.

key.name: warning-threshold-percent
key.description: The usage percentage that triggers a warning notification and panel color.

key.name: alert-threshold-enabled
key.description: Whether usage alerts should be shown when a usage window reaches the alert threshold.

key.name: alert-threshold-percent
key.description: The usage percentage that triggers an alert notification and panel color.

key.name: critical-threshold-enabled
key.description: Whether critical usage alerts should be shown when a usage window reaches the critical threshold.

key.name: critical-threshold-percent
key.description: The usage percentage that triggers a critical notification and panel color.

key.name: critical-high-threshold-enabled
key.description: Whether an additional critical usage alert should be shown near exhaustion.

key.name: critical-high-threshold-percent
key.description: The usage percentage that triggers an additional critical notification and panel color.

key.name: exhausted-threshold-enabled
key.description: Whether exhausted usage alerts should be shown when a usage window reaches the exhausted threshold.

key.name: exhausted-threshold-percent
key.description: The usage percentage that triggers an exhausted notification and panel color.

key.name: proxy-url
key.description: Optional HTTP proxy URL used for vendor usage requests. Leave empty to use the default network configuration.

key.name: use-https-proxy-env
key.description: Whether usage requests should use the HTTPS_PROXY environment variable when no proxy URL is configured.

key.name: anthropic-enabled
key.description: Whether Claude should appear in the panel dropdown.

key.name: anthropic-credentials-path
key.description: Optional path to Claude OAuth credentials. Leave empty to use the default vendor-managed path. Paths inside the home directory are stored home-relative.

key.name: openai-enabled
key.description: Whether Codex should appear in the panel dropdown.

key.name: openai-codex-auth-path
key.description: Optional path to Codex OAuth credentials. Leave empty to use the default vendor-managed path. Paths inside the home directory are stored home-relative.
